name: Printed Tennis Dog Ball Toy - Boots & Barkley™ - 3pk
description:
Update your pet's toy collection with the 3-Pack of Printed Tennis Dog Ball Toy from Boots & Barkley™. This dog toy set includes three tennis balls in varying colors for fun and energetic play. Made of rubber and designed for small and medium breeds, the balls are perfect for playing fetch in your backyard or at the park.

Boots & Barkley™: Because pets are just the best.

100% satisfaction guaranteed or your money back.
